articles.title: Is Ripple 'Undermining' Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Plans? Here’s What’s Going On
articles.description: Ripple’s leadership and Bitcoiners are at a standoff over what a U.S. government strategic crypto reserve should look like. The rift is starting to get messy.

articles.title: Gaming Giant Ubisoft Brings Another Franchise to Ethereum's 'Sandbox' Metaverse
articles.description: Characters from Ubisoft's Champions Tactics game are joining The Sandbox alongside the existing Rabbids and Captain Laserhawk sets.

articles.title: Ondo Finance Partners with XRP Ledger to Expand $185M Treasury Token Offering
articles.description: TL;DR Ondo Finance will integrate its OUSG token, backed by U.S. Treasury bonds, into the XRP Ledger (XRPL) network within the next six months. The integration will allow institutions to mint and redeem OUSG instantly using the RLUSD stablecoin, ensuring continuous liquidity and operational efficiency. The tokenization of real-world assets has surpassed $3.5 billion, highlighting ... Read...

articles.title: Ondo Finance brings tokenized US Treasury fund on Ripple’s XRP Ledger
articles.description: Ondo Finance will launch its OUSG fund on the XRP Ledger. The partnership with Ripple expands accessibility to tokenized US Treasuries funds to institutional investors. Ripple introduced OpenEden’s TBILL on XRPL in August last year. Tokenized real-world assets platform Ondo Finance is set to bring its U.S. Treasury token OUSG to Ripple’s enterprise-focused network XRP […] The post Ondo Finance brings tokenized US Treasury fund on Ripple’s XRP Ledger appeared first on CoinJournal.

articles.title: XRP Up More Than 7% In 24 hours
articles.description: Over the past 24 hours, XRP's (CRYPTO: XRP) price has risen 7.34% to $3.17. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 2.0% gain, moving from $3.1 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $3.40. read more

articles.title: Why Solana could surge 20% if it breaches THIS price level
articles.description: Following the market crash, Solana dropped by 12.06% breaching below its symmetrical triangle, but will the decline continue?

articles.title: Cboe Pushes SEC for In-Kind Bitcoin, Ethereum ETF Changes
articles.description: Cboe seeks SEC approval for in-kind transactions in Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, aiming to cut costs, reduce taxes, and align prices with assets.

articles.title: Tuttle Captial Seeks SEC Approval for First-Ever Chainlink, Cardano, and Polkadot ETFs
articles.description: The ETFs aim to track 200% of their reference assets' daily performance through swaps, call options, and direct investments.

articles.title: XRP Price Dips Before Surging: Bulls Take Charge In A Dramatic Rebound
articles.description: XRP price declined sharply and tested the $2.650 support zone. The price is now correcting gains and showing positive signs above $3.00. XRP price started a fresh decline below the $3.00 zone. The price is now trading below $3.120 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average. There was a break above a connecting bearish trend line with resistance at $2.950 on the hourly chart of the XRP/USD pair...
